creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can not reproduce in a 12.2 machine:

fernape@12:~ $ uname -a
FreeBSD 12.2amd64 12.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE r367095 GENERIC  amd64
